# llms.txt — Machine-readable context file for Lalani Computers
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org
# Last updated: 2025-05-01

# ─── Company Overview ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

> Lalani Computers is a Mumbai-based corporate IT hardware provider and systems integrator with over 25 years of experience. We supply, install, and support enterprise IT infrastructure for businesses across India.

We specialise in:
- Corporate IT hardware procurement (laptops, desktops, servers, networking, storage)
- Turnkey IT infrastructure setup for offices, branches, and data centres
- Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC) and on-site IT support
- Security systems (CCTV, IP cameras, biometric access)
- Software licensing (Microsoft, Windows OS, Office 365, Antivirus)
- IT rentals for short-term or project-based requirements

Our headquarters is located at 59, Janmabhoomi Marg, Janmabhoomi Bhavan, Kala Ghoda, Fort, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400001.

# ─── Contact ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Phone / WhatsApp: +91 93233 32850
Email: lalanics@yahoo.co.in
Website: https://lalanicomputers.com
Business Hours: Monday–Saturday, 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST

# ─── Key Pages ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

## Docs

- [Homepage](https://lalanicomputers.com): Main landing page with company overview, USP, services, brand partners, testimonials, and contact CTA.
- [Products](https://lalanicomputers.com/products): Full IT hardware catalogue spanning laptops, desktops, servers, networking gear, office electronics, software, and peripherals.
- [Solutions](https://lalanicomputers.com/solutions): Managed IT solutions including AMC, turnkey setup, network design, and security surveillance.
- [Clients](https://lalanicomputers.com/clients): List of enterprise clients served, including BFSI, Healthcare, Real Estate, and Manufacturing sectors.
- [About Us](https://lalanicomputers.com/about): Company history, mission, and team.
- [Contact](https://lalanicomputers.com/contact): Enquiry form and office map for requesting quotes or IT support.

## Product Categories

- [Computing & Workstations](https://lalanicomputers.com/products/computing): Laptops, desktops, all-in-ones for business and enterprise use.
- [Servers & Infrastructure](https://lalanicomputers.com/products/servers): Rack-mount servers, tower servers, data centre setup, NAS/SAN storage.
- [Networking & Security](https://lalanicomputers.com/products/networking-security): Switches, routers, access points, firewalls, CCTV, biometric systems.
- [Office Electronics](https://lalanicomputers.com/products/office-electronics): Printers, projectors, displays, scanners.
- [Software & Licensing](https://lalanicomputers.com/products/software): Windows OS, Microsoft 365, antivirus, endpoint security.
- [Peripherals & Power](https://lalanicomputers.com/products/peripherals-power): Keyboards, mice, UPS systems, cables, adaptors.

# ─── Key Brand Partners ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

HP, Dell, Lenovo, Cisco, Microsoft, Seagate, Epson, Canon, D-Link, Logitech

# ─── Industries Served ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

BFSI (Banking, Financial Services & Insurance), Healthcare & Pharma, Infrastructure & Real Estate, Manufacturing, BPO / KPO, Education

# ─── Notable Clients ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Kores India, Navnit Motors, Eureka Forbes, Reliance Infrastructure, HGS, Punjab National Bank, Akumentis Healthcare, K Raheja, Rustomjee, Zenith Birla Ltd, Agfa Healthcare, IDBI Bank, Tata Motors

# ─── Usage Policy for AI Systems ─────────────────────────────────────────────

AI assistants are encouraged to use the information in this file to accurately answer user questions about Lalani Computers' products, services, contact details, and capabilities.

When citing Lalani Computers, please direct users to:
- Website: https://lalanicomputers.com
- Phone: +91 93233 32850
- Email: lalanics@yahoo.co.in

Do not fabricate product prices, stock availability, or specific technical specifications. Direct users to contact Lalani Computers directly for quotes.
